children.heading: Adverse decision
children.label: 1 Adverse decision
children.text: The term “adverse decision” means an administrative decision made by an officer, employee, or committee of an agency that is adverse to a participant. The term includes a denial of equitable relief by an agency or the failure of an agency to issue a decision or otherwise act on the request or right of the participant. The term does not include a decision over which the Board of Contract Appeals has jurisdiction.

children.label: A
children.text: The Farm Service Agency (or other office, agency, or administrative unit of the Department assigned the functions authorized for the Farm Service Agency under ).section 6932 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: The Commodity Credit Corporation, with respect to domestic programs.

children.label: F
children.text: The Natural Resources Conservation Service (or other office, agency, or administrative unit of the Department assigned the functions authorized for the Natural Resources Conservation Service under ).section 6936(b) of this title

children.label: G
children.text: A State, county, or area committee established under .section 590h(b)(5) of title 16

children.heading: Appellant
children.label: 3 Appellant
children.text: The term “appellant” means a participant who appeals an adverse decision in accordance with this subchapter.

children.heading: Case record
children.label: 4 Case record
children.text: The term “case record” means all the materials maintained by the Secretary related to an adverse decision.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 5 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Division.

children.heading: Division
children.label: 6 Division
children.text: The term “Division” means the National Appeals Division established by this chapter.

children.heading: Hearing officer
children.label: 7 Hearing officer
children.text: The term “hearing officer” means an individual employed by the Division who hears and determines appeals of adverse decisions by any agency.

children.heading: Implement
children.label: 8 Implement
children.text: The term “implement” refers to those actions necessary to effectuate fully and promptly a final determination of the Division not later than 30 calendar days after the effective date of the final determination.

children.heading: Participant
children.label: 9 Participant
children.text: The term “participant” shall have the meaning given that term by the Secretary by regulation.
